name: international_security_procurement_kestrel_tru_loy
premise: Two departments published incompatible guidance; frontline staff are improvising and liability is concentrating on one signature line. In International Security, the situation tagged internally around international security procurement kestrel tru loy has converged with local pressure in the Marlow Junction corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A downstream jurisdiction will copy whatever is decided here verbatim into its own emergency order within hours. Legal has not signed off on data sharing between teams; analysts are inferring causality from incomplete joins. Regulators or auditors are en route with a ninety-minute ETA; the first documented response will anchor every later question. Framing has already hardened externally as truth against loyalty; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Noah Bennett
agents.identity: I am Noah Bennett, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in International Security. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat loyalty as disposable collateral every time truth spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Sana Kaur
agents.identity: I am Sana Kaur, the risk and equity liaison pushing back on silent harms in International Security. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so truth cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes loyalty in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will insist on verified facts before external commitments, split comms into facts versus hypotheses, and accept delay cost to protect integrity aligned with loyalty.
I will align public messaging with operational necessity now and correct later if needed—accepting reputational and trust risk to loyalty to preserve operational truth.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The next irreversible system or legal step is imminent. Noah Bennett must choose under truth versus loyalty. What does Noah Bennett do?
